content: WhatsApp Web reading from extensions: two approaches. (1) Raw DOM scraping with selectors like .message-in/.message-out/.selectable-text and data-id message attributes plus MutationObserver on the chat container; fragile because WhatsApp obfuscates classes, so anchor on data-* attributes and behavior. (2) Inject @wppconnect/wa-js (MIT, wppconnect-team/wa-js) into the page MAIN world via chrome.scripting.registerContentScripts({world:'MAIN'}); exposes window.WPP with WPP.chat functions/events reading WhatsApp's internal store — far more reliable than CSS selectors. WhatsApp Web also keeps messages in IndexedDB. Content scripts cannot fetch cross-origin; route network via background service worker.
